raw_calls.callee: (()=>{var xt,jt,Lt,Kt;const Ut=d||window.__tradesLastScan;if(!Ut||!Ut.results||Ut.results.length===0)return"";const Jt=Ut.results.find(Vt=>Vt.symbol===e);if(Jt)return`**${isMarketOpen()?"Intraday":"EOD (Yarina Hazirlik)"} Tarama:** Bu hisse taramalarda **#${Ut.results.indexOf(Jt)+1}** sirada — Guven: %${Jt.confidence}, Skor: ${Jt.intScore}, R/R: 1:${((xt=Jt.intradayRR)==null?void 0:xt.toFixed(1))||"?"}.
